title: Universal Preview Pipeline and Resume Studio
objective: 建立多格式预览能力和 Resume Studio，使 Markdown、多媒体、PDF、Typst、LaTeX 与简历模板下载进入可维护的本地工作流

tasks.title: Implement rich Markdown preview
acceptance_criteria: Markdown preview supports frontmatter, headings, code blocks, callouts and wiki-link rendering
Unsafe HTML and script injection are sanitized
Preview can distinguish source-only links from public user links
tasks.notes: This is a foundation for both admin and public reading surfaces.

tasks.title: Implement media and document preview adapters
acceptance_criteria: Images, PDFs, audio, video and code files have appropriate preview modes
Unsupported Office-style files fall back to metadata and download/open actions
Preview adapters do not expose local absolute paths on public surfaces
tasks.notes: Office conversion can be staged if dependency risk is high.

tasks.title: Implement Typst and LaTeX compile preview plan
acceptance_criteria: Typst compile path is documented and verified for resume output
LaTeX compile path has a safe fallback and clear environment requirements
Compile artifacts are routed to controlled output directories and do not pollute source files
tasks.notes: Compilation is local and must not perform external upload.

tasks.title: Build Resume Studio interface
acceptance_criteria: Resume Studio shows structured resume facts, generated PDF preview and compile status
Resume data edits are treated as local source changes requiring human review
The page links evidence records to resume sections where possible
tasks.notes: Avoid silent changes to resume facts.

tasks.title: Bind evidence files to resume facts
acceptance_criteria: Evidence manifest maps awards, roles, projects and certificates to resume entries
Evidence files can be previewed or opened from the admin interface
Private or sensitive evidence publication is explicitly gated
tasks.notes: Evidence publication is separate from local evidence management.

tasks.title: Add resume template download package
acceptance_criteria: Download package contains resume YAML, Typst template, generated PDF and a manifest
Package generation is reproducible and documented
Sensitive evidence files are not bundled unless explicitly approved
tasks.notes: Keep public package separate from private evidence archive.
